tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Severing.label: Psychic severing
tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Severing.description: Temporarily severs the psychic attunement of all humanlike creatures on the map, to protect them from negative psychic forces like psychic drones. Performed properly, the effects will last for two days: just long enough to outlast most psychic drones. Performed improperly, the effects will last for much longer.
tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Severing.outcomeDescription: At the current ritual quality, the chance of successfully controlling the duration is {0}.

tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Relocate.label: Tree relocation
tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Relocate.description: Relocates the anima tree to a new location. If the ritual is successful, the tree will move to the desired location. If it is unsuccessful, it will end up at a random location near the desired target.
tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Relocate.outcomeDescription: At the current ritual quality, the chance of success is {0}.

tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Fever.label: Induce psychic fever
tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Fever.description: Induces a psychic fever in the ritual targets, a desperate action, for those who have little chance of surviving a disease otherwise. The psychic fever greatly increases immunity gain speed, but makes the target delirious and unable to care for themself and others. Those experiencing psychic fever require frequent tending, or they will die in 6 hours. The invoker will attempt to control the fever, limiting its duration to just a couple days, but if the ritual goes wrong the duration will be much longer.
tsoa.rituals.PsychicRitualDef_Fever.outcomeDescription: At the current ritual quality, the chance of success is {0}.
